title: Medieval Weapons
description: A mod adding various realistic weapons to the game.
body:
A mod adding various historically accurate Medieval weapons to the game, such as:
- A Sword based on a 15thC Coustille - a short sword favored by the French, especially around the 1500s.
- A dagger called the kidney, or "bollock" dagger. In-game, it's called the bollock dagger.
- A longsword based on a German sword from around the 1430s 

https://discord.gg/fexqTKtbHF

You may use this mod in your modpack as long as you provide a clickable link to it in the description.
